name: Flounder in Sweet-Sour Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the flounder fillets into serving-sized pieces.
2. In a skillet, brown onions in butter over medium heat until softened.
3. Add flour and cook for 3 minutes, stirring constantly.
4. Pour in beer and remaining ingredients except vinegar. Stir to combine.
5. Reduce heat to low and simmer until the sauce thickens.
6. Gently add the flounder pieces, cover, and continue cooking until the fish is cooked through.
7. Add vinegar and cook for an additional 2 minutes to enhance flavor.
8. Serve hot.
